2026-05-31T10:04:49.0437512Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.0437784Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.0438035Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.0438292Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.0438693Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.0439031Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.0439246Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.1969855Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3503278Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3503692Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3504109Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3504391Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3504704Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3505045Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3505392Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3505782Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3506153Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3506489Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3507005Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3507356Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3508141Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3508591Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3508782Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3509111Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3509637Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3510086Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3510309Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3510852Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3511410Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3511603Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-05-31T10:04:49.3511923Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
